branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

title: Prospective cluster-p registry --- separates already-computed reference observables from genuinely prospective ones
description: C3 (cluster-selection-post-hoc) caveat addresses by pre-registering candidate observables at registration timestamp T_0 BEFORE their post-loop residuals are computed. Honesty constraint: observables whose residuals were ALREADY in the corpus at T_0 cannot count as prospective; they are reference observables. Only future computation residuals (computed AFTER T_0) qualify for the prospective cluster-p.

null_model.name: uniform_residual_under_loop_class
null_model.description: Each observable's residual is drawn uniformly from [0, residual_cut] under the null. The cluster-p is computed via Fisher combination over the prospectively-registered observable set ONLY (not including reference observables).

reference_observables_already_computed_a.observable: Triangle phase-class winding fraction f_neg on 8-regime ladder
reference_observables_already_computed_a.scope: lattice extension N in [50, 300]; 116 seeds total in Stage 6g style audit
reference_observables_already_computed_a.note: ALREADY in corpus at registry timestamp T_0; cannot count as prospective. Listed as reference for cross-comparison.

reference_observables_already_computed_a.observable: Triangle phase-class asymmetry a_inf on 6-regime ladder
reference_observables_already_computed_a.scope: P5-physics ladder N in [64, 300] inclusive of N=200, N=300
reference_observables_already_computed_a.note: ALREADY in corpus at registry timestamp T_0; cannot count as prospective.

prospective_observables_pending_computat.observable: Gravitational coupling-scaling diagnostic at lattice-extension regimes
lattice_run_required: Closed 2026-05-11 by post-snapshot reconstruction (src/prospective/extend_c5_d1embedded_to_higher_N.py): the c5 d1-embedded diagnostic is now bundled at all nine within-canonical-regime lattice points P5N{64,72,84,100,128,200,256,300,512} with newton_like_badness=1.000 at every point (N-stable across factor-8 N-range). The projector-bandwidth-regression mode of the Xi-projected Phi_eff is therefore N-stable across the full canonical ladder, not a finite-N effect; the theory-conformant Newton-asymptote is carried by the bare-Phi standard.
prospective_observables_pending_computat.physical_motivation: the gravitational coupling-scaling diagnostic has THREE independent readings in the broader corpus (Paper 05 Section 6 Resolution (b) + d1-embedded lattice-N extension): (i) the BARE-Phi_eff theory-conformant standard from results_c5_fix4 -- on P_0, P_1, P_2': newton_like_pass = (0.0, 1.0, 0.929) and far_field_exponent = (-0.024, -1.000, -1.000), i.e. clean 1/r Newton on P_1 and P_2', matching the SCD-01 Schwarzschild-defect Xi-perturbation backbone delta_Xi(r) ~ -GM/r; (ii) the Xi-projected projector-diagnostic reading from results_c5_real + results_c5_p3..p6_extension -- on the same six regimes newton_like_pass = 0 with far_field_exponent in [-0.05, -0.003], a flat-far-field artefact classified PROJECTOR_BANDWIDTH_REGRESSION, NOT physics; (iii) the d1-embedded lattice-N extension on results_d1_p5n64 and results_d1_p5n100 (the two lattice-N regimes that currently carry the full 1178-key d1 output) -- newton_like_badness_best = 1.000 at BOTH lattice-N points (i.e. the projector-bandwidth-regression mode is N-stable across the two available lattice-N values). The remaining lattice-N regimes (P5N72/84/128/200/256/300/512) bundle NPZ state-vector snapshots (used by Paper4/Paper4B/Paper4C and the present paper's within-P5 ladder closures) plus a 33-key reduced d1 summary; running the c5 newton/far-field/poisson diagnostic on those snapshots would close PROSP-01 with a 7+-point Symanzik fit.
prospective_observables_pending_computat.notes: Status updated 2026-05-03 to PARTIAL_BROADER_CORPUS_RESULT. The d1-embedded c5 diagnostic is bundled at TWO lattice-N points (P5N64, P5N100) and shows N-stable projector-bandwidth-regression behaviour. Closing the registry's full Symanzik-2 lattice-N extension still requires extending the 1178-key d1 output to the higher lattice-N regimes (P5N128..P5N300). The three readings are bundled in data/prospective_inputs/ under c5_bareflavour_*.json, c5_p?.json, and c5_d1embedded_P5N*.json respectively; the script src/prospective/compute_prospective_residuals.py reports all three.

prospective_observables_pending_computat.physical_motivation: the canonical-regime audit reports the diagnostic on P1 (cosmo_compat=0.690, gate_gap=0.240, dm_share=0.341, theory_status=COSMO_GATE_OPEN) with the lambda_DM/lambda_DE FRW-ratio self-consistency exactly self-consistent at z~0.77; the prospective extension to lattice-N variants tests N-stability.
prospective_observables_pending_computat.notes: Genuine prospective registration; data on lattice-extension regimes NOT in corpus at T_0.

prospective_observables_pending_computat.observable: Charged-current Xi-reactivity ratio at the P_2' regime, after a coupling re-run with the current carrier-defect coupling g = 1.42
lattice_run_required: P2prime canonical re-run with current g = 1.42
prospective_observables_pending_computat.physical_motivation: the existing P2'/P5 ratio audit reports cw_net_corrected ratio 3.43 and abs_over_sync_floor ratio 3.17 at the heuristic carrier-defect coupling g_old = 2.00; the framework's rigorous coupling is g_new = 1.42 +/- 0.10 (four-path consensus). The pre-registered prediction is that at g_new the ratio drops to 1.0 +/- 0.05.
prospective_observables_pending_computat.leading_order_analytic_projection_note: g^2-rescaling alone gives projected ratio ~1.66, residual ~0.66 -- well outside the prediction window 0.05 and the null support [0, 0.025]. The leading-order projection therefore FALSIFIES the prediction at leading order; the prospective residual is still pending the full re-run, which can either confirm the falsification or expose a sub-leading backreaction-screening mechanism. The leading-order projection is not the prospective residual; it is reported only as a broader-corpus consistency check.
prospective_observables_pending_computat.notes: Pre-registered prediction: at g = 1.42 input, the ratio should drop to ~1.0 +/- 0.05. Genuine prospective registration; the post-T_0 re-run residual is NOT in corpus at T_0.

execution_protocol: Step 2: prospective observables (PROSP-01..03) require lattice/regime data computed AFTER T_0; residuals MUST NOT be back-filled.
Step 3: reference observables (REF-01..02) were ALREADY in the corpus at T_0 and cannot count as prospective; they are listed for cross-comparison only.
Step 4: when prospective data lands, compute the cluster-p on PROSP-01..03 ONLY (not on the reference set).

Step 5: a successful prospective cluster-p (p < 0.01 under the uniform null on a Fisher combination of the 3 prospective residuals) provides independent corroboration of the topology-labeled mapping protocol --- this is the C3-addressing test.

fail_safe.description: If any prospective observable fails to converge or its lattice run is not feasible by 2026-12-31, the registry is closed at the converged subset. The cluster-p is computed on the converged subset only; failed observables are reported as 'not converged in registration window'.

audit_trail.modification_policy: this file is APPEND-ONLY post-registration; reference observables (REF-XX) may be added at any time as long as their data was in the corpus at T_0; prospective observables (PROSP-XX) may not be added after T_0 without invalidating prospective status
